20.reason: [This loop condition causes undefined behavior because it doesn't check for newline; it reads until EOF, which may not occur in test cases that end with newline, leading to infinite loop or buffer overflow. Also, j starts at 1 but c[0],d[0] already read, so indexing is off.]
